yourUsecase.title: Your Agent
yourUsecase.description: Short description of what this agent does
yourUsecase.promptPlaceholder: Describe your goals, requirements, and any relevant details...
yourUsecase.contextPlaceholder: Specify any useful information (competitive context, specific stakes...)

starter.title: Welcome to your Elio scaffold
starter.description: Choose how to start your first Agent App.
starter.intro: How do you want to begin?
starter.subIntro: Three paths — pick the one that matches your situation.
starter.cleanupHint: Once your app is built, ask the Replit AI: "Remove the starter page" to clean up.

product.title: I already have product.md
product.desc: You wrote your specs ahead of time (alone or with the PM).

input.title: I have a Google AI Studio prototype
input.desc: Drop your .tsx or .zip export into the Input/ folder.

idea.title: No idea yet
idea.desc: Answer 2 questions, the AI suggests 3 concrete app ideas.

idea.roleHint: The role or function you hold day-to-day.
idea.rolePlaceholder: e.g. digital transformation consultant, data analyst, HR project manager...
idea.painLabel: Which task takes too much of your time every week?
idea.painPlaceholder: e.g. every Friday I spend 2h compiling customer feedback into a report...
idea.thinking: Generating 3 ideas tailored to your role...
idea.resultsTitle: Here are 3 Agent App ideas for you
idea.nextStep: Like one? Refine it with the PM:

upload.specHint: Drop your product.md (and backlog.md if you have one) below, or use the prompt if they're already at the project root.
upload.prototypeHint: Drop your Google AI Studio export (.tsx, .zip, .json…) below, or use the prompt if it's already in Input/.
